text:
Ivona Kawski (イホナ＝カウスキー, Ihona Kausukī) Hunter × Hunter Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (pg. 202) is a former Greed Island player. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 151 

Appearance

Ivona is spindly and has long dark blond hair tied back and dark brown eyes. He wears a vest with a long-sleeved shirt underneath and an accordion-like skirt. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Desperate to get out of the game, he exchanges a rare card with Gon for a "Leave" card in front of the spell card shop in Masadora. 

Ivona's name is mentioned later in Gon's binder. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Ivona Kawski is capable of utilizing Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Though Ivona Kawski's name is technically given in the manga through Gon's Greed Island binder, the correspondence between the character and his name is only provided in the Hunter's Guide databook. 

Manga and Anime Differences

Ivona does not appear in the 1999 anime adaptation.
Ivona wears tea-shade sunglasses in the 2011 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 67 (2011) 
Instead of Gon, Ivona trades with Killua in the 2011 anime adaptation.
